title: pomaderris racemosa
intro: Pomaderris racemosa, also known as the coastal pomaderris, is a small to medium-sized shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pomaderris racemosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Pomaderris racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
